name: It's Cool to be Kind Hanging Kids' Knit Banner - Pillowfort™
description: Spread positivity in any space with this It's Cool to Be Kind Hanging Knit Banner from Pillowfort™. This white hanging banner features the quote "It's Cool to Be Kind" knitted in black to pop against the background. Whether you hang this quote knitted banner in your living room or any other area, you'll love the elegant look added by it to your space.
